programme.title: The Great Barrier Reef: World's most amazing coral reef
programme.desc: This expedition to the Great Barrier Reef is designed to study the health and resilience of one of the world’s most amazing coral reefs. The expedition’s goal is to collect data about the world's most remote reefs and build a picture of how reefs are faring in today's changing climate.

programme.title: Extinction Soup
programme.desc: Extinction Soup is a documentary about the ground-breaking efforts to stop the international trade of shark fins. The story follows filmmaker Philip Waller on his quest to document the efforts of conservationist Stefanie Brendl, founder of Shark Allies, as she fights to educate lawmakers and helps pass legislation that will ban the trade of fins and the consumption of shark fin soup - the driving force behind the slaughter of millions of sharks every year.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: With the contestants narrowed down to 32, Don Mann and Randy Couture reveal a new twist that changes the game: a complex point system that turns survival into a strategic battle. Contestants face grueling military training and a brutal 5K run through Nevada’s desert, testing their endurance and mental toughness. As mentors and adversaries, Don and Randy push the contestants to their limits. This episode marks the beginning of an intense journey where only the strongest and most strategic will prevail.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: The best of the best are back to compete, and Don’s serving up a heaping plate of his signature 10-part PRT. A bear crawl down a mountain, log running and two-point planks are just some of Don’s welcome gauntlet. And the cherry on top—a 5k desert run. But the contestants only have themselves to blame. Because when you’re already amongst the elite, you have to do whatever it takes to find the one who stands above the rest.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Climbing to the top, literally! In this episode, you better put your fear of heights away. The contestants have the option to earn extra points, but not everyone is happy about it. Mental strength is tested through rappelling from high above the sky. Who will come out on top?

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Planks, Don! Don gave the contestants an option to earn extra points for planking. How does this shake up the top points earners? And of course, there’s shooting challenges. First, Don puts the contestants through realistic military training for a car ambush scenario. Then, three-time state champion, Renee Enchautegui, takes the 32 on a night-time shooting challenge.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: As the mission gets closer, the 32 must prepare for various scenarios, including CQB - Close Quarters Battle - which can be essential in hostage rescue. Watch the live-fire CQB drill teams and see how they stack up. Plus Don & Randy give the top competitors one last chance to rack up BIG points with another 700 yard Roll-The-Dice Pinnacle Shot. Find out who won... and who lost, in this episode of Surviving Mann.

programme.desc: To educate our children about the profound impact of travel we travel to Miami, Florida. We'll learn about the area's colorful history, taste test its cuisine and salsa dance the night away - if we can make it out of these alligator infested waters first!

programme.title: Big Little Footprints

As the group terrorizes the region with brazen bank and train robberies, Clark must weave through the dangerous frontier to corner the gang and put an end to their violent reign.

programme.title: Wagon Train: Season 2, Episode 16: The Hunter Malloy Story
programme.desc: A former gold miner traveling west to start a new life with his wife finds his plans threatened when two outlaws, who originally intended to rob the wagon train, decide to bide their time after discovering signs of gold in the surrounding hills. As winter approaches, the tension rises between the passengers and the predatory pair

programme.title: Honor of the Range
programme.desc: After Sheriff Ken puts money in the safe, his brother Clem gives Rawhide the combination. With the money gone the disgruntled townsmen make Boots Sheriff and lock up Ken. Clem, now a prisoner of Rawhide, has a change of heart and sends Ken a message with the outlaw's location. Ken escapes by impersonating the saloon entertainer and rides for the hangout.

programme.title: Far Frontier
programme.desc: Willis Newcomb and Bart Carroll head a gang engaged in smuggling wanted-American criminals back into the United States from Mexico. Operating from Sharperville, an oil town on the American side of the border, they transport their human cargo in oil drums loaded on trucks.

programme.title: Trouble Busters
